artifacts.summary: Session C progress: added irreflexive_mcs_has_strict_future lemma, proved unreachable cases via Temporal 4 closure, improved CantorApplication structure
Session D progress: added reflexivity derivation pattern for strict density proofs, reduced DensityFrameCondition sorries from 16 to 10
Iteration 3 analysis: confirmed all sorries are reflexive MCS cases requiring Finset.strongInductionOn iteration approach
Session E: Deep analysis of 13 sorries, confirmed reflexive MCS root cause, implementation path via Finset.strongInductionOn identified
Session F: Attempted Finset approach, discovered decidability challenges, identified Nat recursion alternative
Iteration 4: Nat.strongRecOn approach recommended to avoid Finset decidability issues

partial_progress.details: Iteration 4: Attempted Finset.strongInductionOn but hit decidability issues with Set membership. Added SubformulaClosure import and Classical.propDecidable. Identified Nat recursion as cleaner alternative. 13 sorries remain (10 DensityFrameCondition, 3 CantorApplication).

completion_data.completion_summary: Iteration 4: Attempted well-founded iteration via Finset.strongInductionOn. Discovered Finset.filter decidability issues with Set membership. Added SubformulaClosure import. Identified Nat.strongRecOn as cleaner alternative. Handoff written for next iteration.
